scripts._comment: Dev scripts go through `doppler run` — Doppler injects env vars into the process. Setup: doppler login && doppler setup. Without Doppler: cd apps/api && pnpm dev (uses local .env.local).
scripts.secrets:pull: doppler secrets download --no-file --format=env > .env.dopplerpulled.local && echo '✓ Secrets pulled to .env.dopplerpulled.local (gitignored)'
